mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.status, r.remark FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND ur.user_id = #{loginId}

SELECT * FROM sys_user u WHERE u.is_delete = 0
AND u.status = #{paramsMap.status}
AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paramsMap.keyword}, '%') OR u.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paramsMap.keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paramsMap.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.id DESC
